hooks.command: for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' '\n'); do case "$f" in *.py) ruff format --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null;; *.go) gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null; goimports -w "$f" 2>/dev/null;; *.rs) rustfmt "$f" 2>/dev/null;; *.js|*.ts|*.jsx|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.html) npx --yes prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; done; true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(\.lock|lock\.json|egg-info|node_modules|vendor/)' && echo 'BLOCK: do not edit generated/lock/vendor files' && exit 1 || true
